purpose: mechanism probe for the derived_actors subject guard: does the LLM's 'data protection officer' subject survive live extraction (the U09/U11 fix)? Subject-level check only, no gold.
selection: all GDPR Art 37-39 paragraphs mentioning the DPO, excluding test2 members and their IRI families (gdpr:art_38/par_6*, gdpr:art_39/par_1*)
